violations.text: The back prep area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Per PIC, establishment received hand sink on 6/25/24 and will be installed by end of day today. PIC to send picture of hand sink installation by 6/28/24. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024

The back prep area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024
The establishment does not have an allergen statement present for consumer awareness. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
